endpoints.name: Gets a list of supported orchestrators in the specified subscription.
endpoints.description: Gets a list of supported orchestrators in the specified subscription. The operation returns properties of each orchestrator including version, available upgrades and whether that version or upgrades are in preview.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.
